arts.ttl: Sky Sports confirm Blackburn Rovers fixture change against play-off rival
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers have seen one of their games selected for TV coverage

arts.ttl: John Eustace issues Derby County injury update as key man set to miss Blackburn clash
arts.sum: John Eustace says Matt Clarke has returned to training following a slight knock but Nathaniel Mendez-Laing will be missing for Derby County against Blackburn this weekend. However the centre-back has been back on the grass this week although Mendez-Laing will again be absent for the visit of Eustace's former club this weekend.

arts.ttl: John Eustace's view on Blackburn Rovers reunion and Derby County challenge
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers face their former head coach on Saturday

arts.ttl: Preview: Derby County vs. Blackburn Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Derby County and Blackburn Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.o

arts.ttl: John Eustace makes Jeff Hendrick admission as Derby County contemplate transfer
arts.sum: John Eustace believes Jeff Hendrick's experience will help his Derby County dressing room as the club contemplates offering him an emotional return to Pride Park. Eustace said the 33-year-old has looked "great" since being brought back to the club and a short-term deal could be on the cards for the midfielder who made his name at Derby before being sold to Burnley in 2016 for £10.5m.
